title: All Rails Matter
description: Rails are cheaper and have closer prices
body:
Rails are now cheaper, using nuggets instead of previous ingot counterparts, as well as giving 16 rails per craft for each type of rail instead of differing amounts per rail.

![Powered Rail Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da1af8738d38892e17ce42e1360ad692f14c514.png)
